Container.Name: obsidian-sync-station
Container.Overview: Keeps an Obsidian vault synced using Obsidian's official headless Sync client (ob), with an optional local backup to your server storage. Configure everything from the web UI: Obsidian login (email/password/MFA), remote vault selection, optional end-to-end decryption password, and sync status. LAN-only by design: the web UI holds your Obsidian credentials, so do NOT expose it to the internet. Requires an active Obsidian Sync subscription. The proprietary ob client is installed from npm on first start (not bundled). Give the container its own dedicated vault path and never point the Obsidian desktop app at the same path. Backup: set Enable Backup to true and map the Backup path to enable scheduled tar.gz snapshots (schedule + retention configured in the web UI).
Container.Description: Web UI + container for syncing an Obsidian vault via the official headless client, with optional local backups. Built for Unraid.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port for the web UI (container listens on 8080). 8080 is often taken on Unraid, so this defaults to 8484 — change it if needed. LAN-only, do not expose to the internet.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Persistent state: settings, GUI password, Obsidian login + the ob client install.

Config.Name: Vault
Config.Description: The synced vault files. Use a DEDICATED path only this container writes to. Never point the Obsidian desktop app here at the same time.

Config.Name: Backup
Config.Description: Snapshot target on your server storage. Only used when Enable Backup is true.

Config.Name: Enable Backup
Config.Description: Set to true to enable scheduled backups and show backup options in the web UI.

Config.Name: Device Name
Config.Description: Label shown in the Obsidian Sync history.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone. Drives the backup schedule and all timestamps shown in the web UI.

Config.Name: Mirror snapshots
Config.Description: Set to true to also copy each snapshot to a second destination (map the Mirror path).

Config.Name: Mirror
Config.Description: Second snapshot destination. Only used when Mirror snapshots is true. Point this at another disk/share for an off-box copy.

Config.Name: ntfy URL
Config.Description: Optional ntfy topic URL for push notifications (also settable in the web UI), e.g. https://ntfy.example.com/obsidian.

Config.Name: restic repository
Config.Description: Optional off-site backup via restic. Local example: /backup/restic. Cloud: s3:s3.amazonaws.com/bucket, b2:bucket:path, sftp:user@host:/path. For cloud, add the backend credential variables too (AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID/AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, B2_ACCOUNT_ID/B2_ACCOUNT_KEY, ...) via Add another Path/Port/Variable.

Config.Name: restic password
Config.Description: Encryption password for the restic repository. Required when restic repository is set. Keep it safe — the repo cannot be read without it.
